summary: Comprehensive testing of SportsConnect event management with multi-race/distance pricing. All backend APIs and frontend features for organizer event editing with races/épreuves are working correctly. Edit dialog opens properly, shows existing races, and allows add/remove/modify operations.

ui_bugs.issue: Edit button in table action column can be confused with view link due to similar styling. The button at index 1 (direct child of actions div) is the correct edit button.
ui_bugs.selector: table tbody tr td:last-child div > button:nth-child(2)

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

passed_tests: Edit dialog shows event details (title, location, price, description)
Edit dialog shows races/épreuves section with existing races
Ajouter button adds new race to list
Remove (X) button removes race from list
Race fields editable (name, price, places, km)
Backend PUT /api/events/{event_id} accepts races array - 16/16 pytest tests PASSED
Events list page shows 8 events with distance tags
Event detail page shows ÉPREUVES DISPONIBLES section
Participant dashboard shows registrations with bib numbers
Admin dashboard shows platform stats (6 users, 8 events, 2 inscriptions)
action_items: Optional: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
Optional: Add data-testid to edit button for easier test automation
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_Trail de Montagne events with races for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event editing with multi-race management is fully functional. Edit dialog found at OrganizerDashboard.js (lines 690-896). To click edit button: select table tbody tr td:last-child div > button:nth-child(2) or use evaluate() to find direct children of actions div. Races are stored as array in MongoDB events collection. Backend PUT endpoint at /api/events/{event_id} accepts full event updates including races array.
